title: Multithreaded World Generation System
description: Designed an asynchronous C# world generation system in Godot for scalability. Debugged parallel process stability issues through root cause analysis to ensure consistent execution.

title: Custom Engine Betting Game
description: Developed a data-driven auto-battler from scratch using C# and MonoGame. Architected a custom high-performance engine for 2D rendering and modular gameplay to avoid commercial engine overhead.
